children.name: 1. Test Case ID: RDSSPG  - Response violates schema      None is not of type 'string'      Schema at /properties/detail/items/properties/type:          {             "type": "string",             "format": "error",             "title": "Error Message",             "description": "The type of error",             "example": "An error has occurred, the details of the error are ...",             "maxLength": 1000,             "minLength": 1,             "pattern": "^[0-9a-zA-Z].*$"         }      Value:          null  [422] Unprocessable Entity:      `{"detail":[{"loc":null,"msg":"authorization error","type":null}]}`  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H 'X-API-Key: [Filtered]' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/v1/health/ready

Invalid SLOT specified. (occurred while parsing \"optional_string(slot or time)\")","type":null}]}`  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' 'http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/cardano/registration/cip36?asat=SLOT%3A%D9%A0'

Test Case ID: ZpFrT1  - Undocumented HTTP status code      Received: 400     Documented: 401, 500, 200, 422, 403, 429, 503  [400] Bad Request:  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H '0: ' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/config/frontend/schema  2. Test Case ID: mFGfRu  - Accepted negative data      Allowed statuses: 400, 401, 403, 404, 422, 5xx  [200] OK:      `{"sentry":null}`  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H '0: ' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/config/frontend/schema  3. Test Case ID: gZZysV  - Authentication declared but not enforced for this operation      The API returned `200 OK` for `GET /api/draft/config/frontend/schema` with invalid auth.  - Response violates schema      None is not of type 'object'      Schema at /properties/sentry/allOf/0:          {             "type": "object",             "description": "Frontend configuration for Sentry.",             "required": [                 "dsn"             ],             "properties": {                 "dsn": {                     "type": "string",                     "description": "The Data Source Name (DSN) for Sentry.",                     "maxLength": 100,                     "pattern": "^https?://"                 },                 "release": {                     "type": "string",                     "description": "A version of the code deployed to an environment.",                     "maxLength": 100,                     "pattern": "^[0-9a-zA-Z].*$"                 },             // Output truncated...         }      Value:          null  [200] OK:      `{"sentry":null}`  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/config/frontend/schema
